text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I don't even know why Ibother with you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I'm still not as good as I need to be...<n>What am I
missing?)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Marvelous timing! ☆

We're looking for someone to hang<n>out with!
Wanna join us?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Pfft. As if I'd want to...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Wait. I heard hanging out with these<n>two is like
going through boot camp.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh, but even if that's true, they're<n>such a pain in
the butt. And it's not<n>like I have any obligation to—)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go! ☆ Off we are to a<n>marvelous hang!
★

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hold on—I never agreed to... Hey! Stop<n>pushing
me!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I've spotted an absolutely<n>marvelous roller
coaster! ☆ Let's take<n>it for a whirl! ★

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Damn, are they trying to speedrun<n>the day? If I
throw in the towel now,<n>I'll just feel like a loser!"

Wow! Taishin, you're tough! But I<n>know exactly
how you do it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(She's copying my tactics! Rrgh! If<n>that's how it
is...)

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hey, you two! Where should we go<n>next?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I can't keep up anymore! No<n>choice—I have to get
out of here!)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Taishin?! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I think I've got a handle on their<n>movement
patterns. I don't have<n>much strength left, so if I
want to<n>escape, I'll have to be smart...)

(There! I should be able to make a<n>break for it
down this path!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Phew... There's no way they can<n>catch up now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haha, I totally gave those weirdos the<n>slip.

I guess calling that a boot camp<n>wasn't exactly
wrong...
